Terminology Maps VF_deviceTypePacemaker
Group 1Mapping from http://va.gov/terminology/vistaDefinedElements/698.4-1 to SNOMED CT (all versions)
Source CodeRelationshipTarget CodeComment
A ('A' FOR A LEAD;)360129009 (Cardiac pacemaker lead (physical object))A more specific SNOMED code will be requested for the VA Extension
AV ('AV' FOR BOTH A LEAD AND V LEAD;)360129009 (Cardiac pacemaker lead (physical object))A more specific SNOMED code will be requested for the VA Extension
G ('G' FOR GENERATOR;)118378005 (Pacemaker pulse generator, device (physical object))
P ('P' FOR PSA ANALYZER;)303476002 (Cardiovascular equipment (physical object))Pacing System Analyzer. A more specific SNOMED code will be requested for the VA Extension
T ('T' FOR TELEPHONE TRANSMITTER;)706635000 (Telephone transmitter/receiver system (physical object))
